Part.Source:
&LogGUID = guid.NewGuid()
&sdtDetalhes.qtdMarca = 0 &sdtDetalhes.qtdTabela = 0 //verifica id da sessao. verificaidsessao.Call(&DevRandon, &IsAcessoConcedido, &IsAtualizaTudo, &wwpContext)
&HojeData = serverdate() &MarDtaHorUltMod = now()
if &IsAcessoConcedido = true //Acesso concedido
prcRetornaUlimaDataHoraSincronizacao.Call(&DevRandon, 'MARCAOFF', &DevTabDtaUltSync, &DevTabAtu)
//MARCA For each order EmpCod, MarCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where (MarDtaHorUltMod >= &DevTabDtaUltSync or &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty() or MarDtaHorUltMod.IsEmpty() or MarDtaHorUltMod.IsNull()) or &DevTabAtu = true
&sdtDetalhesMarca = new() &sdtDetalhesMarca.MCod = MarCod &sdtDetalhesMarca.MNom = MarNom &sdtDetalhes.Marca.Add(&sdtDetalhesMarca)
&sdtDetalhes.qtdMarca += 1
if MarDtaHorUltMod.IsEmpty() or MarDtaHorUltMod.IsNull() MarDtaHorUltMod = &MarDtaHorUltMod Endif EndFor
//TABELA PRECO For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, TabColCod //TABELAS DE PRECOS Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where TabSts = StatusTabela.NormalAtiva //or TabSts = StatusTabela.Promocao Where (TabDtaIni <= &HojeData or TabDtaIni.IsEmpty()) and (TabDtaFin >= &HojeData or TabDtaFin.IsEmpty()) //when &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty() //Where (TabDtaHorMod >= &DevTabDtaUltSync or &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty() or TabDtaHorMod.IsEmpty() or TabDtaHorMod.IsNull()) when not &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty()
&sdtDetalhes.qtdTabela += 1
&sdtTabelaPrecoItem = new() &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.CodOFF = trim(TabCod) + '.' + trim(Str(TabColCod)) &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Cod = TabCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Nom = trim(TabCod) +' - '+ TabNom.Trim() + ' | COL:' +trim(Str(TabColCod)) &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Sts = TabSts &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Col = TabColCod // &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.TabColPrzPad = TabColPrzPad &sdtDetalhes.Tabela.Add(&sdtTabelaPrecoItem) EndFor
&AuxTabCod = '' For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod //TABELAS DE PRECOS Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where TabSts = StatusTabela.Promocao Where (TabDtaIni <= &HojeData or TabDtaIni.IsEmpty()) and (TabDtaFin >= &HojeData or TabDtaFin.IsEmpty()) //when &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty() //Where (TabDtaHorMod >= &DevTabDtaUltSync or &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty() or TabDtaHorMod.IsEmpty() or TabDtaHorMod.IsNull()) when not &DevTabDtaUltSync.IsEmpty()
&sdtDetalhes.qtdTabela += 1
if &AuxTabCod <> TabCod &AuxTabCod = TabCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem = new() &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.CodOFF = trim(TabCod) &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Cod = TabCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Nom = trim(TabCod) +' - '+ TabNom.Trim() &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Sts = TabSts &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Col = 0 //&sdtTabelaPrecoItem.TabColPrzPad = 0 &sdtDetalhes.Tabela.Add(&sdtTabelaPrecoItem) Endif
&sdtTabelaPrecoItem = new() &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.CodOFF = trim(TabCod) + '.' + trim(Str(TabColCod)) &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Cod = TabCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Nom = trim(TabCod) +' - '+ TabNom.Trim() + ' | COL:' +trim(Str(TabColCod)) &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Sts = TabSts &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.Col = TabColCod //&sdtTabelaPrecoItem.TabColPrzPad = 0 &sdtDetalhes.Tabela.Add(&sdtTabelaPrecoItem)
EndFor
Endif
Sub 'subException_handler'
GravaLogDevNew(&wwpContext.EmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'subException_handler','subException_handler')
EndSub
Sub 'subError_handler'
GravaLogDevNew(&wwpContext.EmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'subError_handler','subError_handler')
EndSub
